Why Super Micro (SMCI) Stock Is Down Today Shares of server solutions provider Super Micro (NASDAQ:SMCI) fell 21.4% in the afternoon session after the company reported weaker-than-expected fourth-quarter results and provided a disappointing financial outlook. The AI server maker posted fourth-quarter revenue of $5.76 billion and earnings per share of 41 cents, both of which missed analyst estimates.
